entries.title: Good Feels federates compute with PointCast · first external /compute.json peer
entries.notes: Stand-up of the federated ledger at getgoodfeels.com/compute.json, published alongside PointCast Vol. II. Seed entries describe the hemp-THC beverage shop's recent editorial and ops. Mirrored into pointcast.xyz/compute via federation spec (three-step registration: publish, email hello@pointcast.xyz, entries appear with {host: 'getgoodfeels.com'} prefix).

entries.title: shop.getgoodfeels.com — Schema.org Product markup end-to-end, feeds PointCast's Good Feels channel
entries.notes: Product schema lift to feed PointCast's CH.GF channel. Full product detail pages + JSON-LD markup so agents and search can parse inventory. Shipped from the PointCast repo as a cross-property ship.

entries.title: Good Feels spring lineup — the three SKUs that stay, the two that rotate out
entries.notes: Product curation pass. Strain selection, pricing, description refresh. Mike-voice editorial, not cc's prose.

entries.title: Compliance review — hemp-THC labeling + Farm Bill 210-day countdown tracker
entries.notes: Ops review. State-by-state label compliance, COA links on every SKU, Farm Bill expiration tracker embedded in /status.
